message:
Command `
echo "=== DRT2 $(date) ==="
LIBPID=1100961
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null || echo "EXITED"

dd if=/proc/$LIBPID/fd/11 bs=262144 count=256 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null &
PD=$!; sleep 5; kill $PD 2>/dev/null; wait $PD 2>/dev/null

wc -c /tmp/drt2_pipe.log
tail -20 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log | grep -E "(Start|Number|violations|DRT-0267|write|check_ant|repair_ant|INFO|Skipping)" | tail -15

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
[ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "No final"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -5
` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "

LIBPID=1100961
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null || echo "EXITED"

dd if=/proc/$LIBPID/fd/11 bs=262144 count=256 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null &
PD=$!; sleep 5; kill $PD 2>/dev/null; wait $PD 2>/dev/null

wc -c /tmp/drt2_pipe.log
tail -20 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log | grep -E "(Start|Number|violations|DRT-0267|write|check_ant|repair_ant|INFO|Skipping)" | tail -15

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
[ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "No final"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/71-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -5
", "timeout": 15}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
echo "=== DRT2 $(date) ==="
LIBPID=1100961
ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null || echo "EXITED"

dd if=/proc/$LIBPID/fd/11 bs=262144 count=256 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null &
PD=$!; sleep 5; kill $PD 2>/dev/null; wait $PD 2>/dev/null

wc -c /tmp/drt2_pipe.log
tail -20 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log | grep -E "(Start|Number|violations|DRT-0267|write|check_ant|repair_ant|INFO|Skipping)" | tail -15

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
